dialog: You’ve bested me… but I’ll return with fire and fury.
The winds of fate have shifted. I concede… for now.
No spell could save me this time.
Curses! Outmaneuvered by a mere mortal.
Even the stars falter. I yield.
Bah! This round is yours, knight.
I must retreat to study your cunning.
Well played. You’ve earned this moment.
The arcane favors you... this time.
A wise wizard knows when to fold his robes.
I’ll be back, and next time, with thunder.
You’ve cracked the runes of my defense.
My power wanes. I yield to your might.
The board is lost, but not the war.
The omens warned me of this.
A loss is but a lesson in disguise.
You win... but tread carefully from here.
Even dragons must bow to the unexpected.
Magic is fickle, and so is fortune.
Let it be known — you’ve earned my respect.
Defeat is bitter... but enlightening.
I surrender this duel. Mark it well.
Well struck. I shall not resist.
Ah! My stars were misaligned.
Let the pieces rest. You’ve won.
One day, you’ll find me less forgiving.
You’ve silenced my spells with strategy.
You are sharper than my sorcery today.
Even magic yields to mastery.
A single ember does not mean the fire is out.
Well conjured, knight. I submit.
Your mind is a fortress. I cannot breach it.
I underestimated your mortal mind.
I leave the board to you... for now.
The runes say: retreat.
Fine. Keep your victory... it won’t last.
Every sage must bow at least once.
The pieces fall silent. I surrender.
To lose is to learn. I’ve learned much.
A clever feint! I concede.
You outplayed the arcane itself.
Blast it! Foiled by tactics again.
You’ve earned your breath — for now.
The stars whisper your name. I yield.
A pawn, a plan, and now, my downfall.
Victory escapes me like sand through fingers.
This duel is yours, but the storm is coming.
Even wizards must kneel to true strategy.
The board burns... and I must flee.
Enough! I’ll not waste more magic on this.
